document.querySelector(\".ux-mobile-toggle\");\n@@\n \t\t}\n \t});\n }\n+\n+class DateTimeControl {\n+\tconstructor(root) {\n+\t\tthis.root = root;\n+\t\tthis.displayInput = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-display]\");\n+\t\tthis.valueInput = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-value]\");\n+\t\tthis.toggleButton = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-next]\");\n+\t\tthis.hourInput = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-hour]\");\n+\t\tthis.minuteInput = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-minute]\");\n+\t\tthis.todayButton = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-today]\");\n+\t\tthis.nowButton = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-now]\");\n+\t\tthis.clearButton = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-clear]\");\n+\t\tthis.doneButton = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-done]\");\n+\t\tthis.errorMessage = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-datetime-error]\");\n+\t\tthis.locale = document.documentElement.lang || navigator.language || \"en\";\n+\t\tthis.monthFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale, { month: \"long\", year: \"numeric\" });\n+\t\tthis.weekdayFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale, { weekday: \"short\" });\n+\t\tthis.dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale, { dateStyle: \"medium\", timeStyle: \"short\" });\n+\t\tthis.timeFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale, { hour: \"2-digit\", minute: \"2-digit\", hour12: false });\n+\t\tthis.order = this.resolveDateOrder();\n+\t\tthis.firstDay = this.resolveFirstDay();\n+\t\tthis.value = this.parseStoredValue(this.valueInput.value);\n+\t\tthis.viewDate = this.value ? new Date(this.value) : new Date();\n+\n+\t\tif (this.value) {\n+\t\t\tthis.displayInput.value = this.formatDisplay(this.value);\n+\t\t} else {\n+\t\t\tthis.displayInput.value = \"\";\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.renderWeekdays();\n+\t\tthis.renderCalendar();\n+\t\tthis.syncTimeInputs();\n+\t\tthis.bindEvents();\n+\t}\n+\n+\tbindEvents() {\n+\t\tthis.toggleButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.togglePopup());\n+\t\tthis.prevButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.shiftMonth(-1));\n+\t\tthis.nextButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.shiftMonth(1));\n+\t\tthis.todayButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.pickDate(new Date()));\n+\t\tthis.nowButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.pickDate(new Date(), true));\n+\t\tthis.clearButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.clear());\n+\t\tthis.doneButton.addEventListener(\"click\", () => this.commitDisplay(true));\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.addEventListener(\"focus\", () => this.openPopup());\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.addEventListener(\"blur\", () => this.commitDisplay(false));\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n+\t\t\tif (event.key === \"Enter\") {\n+\t\t\t\tevent.preventDefault();\n+\t\t\t\tthis.commitDisplay(true);\n+\t\t\t\tthis.closePopup();\n+\t\t\t}\n+\t\t\tif (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n+\t\t\t\tthis.closePopup();\n+\t\t\t}\n+\t\t});\n+\t\tthis.hourInput.addEventListener(\"change\", () => this.updateTimeFromInputs());\n+\t\tthis.minuteInput.addEventListener(\"change\", () => this.updateTimeFromInputs());\n+\t\tthis.root.addEventListener(\"click\", (event) => this.handleRootClick(event));\n+\t\tdocument.addEventListener(\"click\", (event) => this.handleDocumentClick(event));\n+\t\tdocument.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n+\t\t\tif (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n+\t\t\t\tthis.closePopup();\n+\t\t\t}\n+\t\t});\n+\t\tthis.root.closest(\"form\")?.addEventListener(\"submit\", () => this.commitDisplay(true));\n+\t}\n+\n+\thandleRootClick(event) {\n+\t\tconst target = event.target;\n+\t\tif (!(target instanceof Element)) {\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst dayButton = target.closest(\"[data-ux-datetime-day]\");\n+\t\tif (dayButton) {\n+\t\t\tconst year = Number(dayButton.getAttribute(\"data-year\"));\n+\t\t\tconst month = Number(dayButton.getAttribute(\"data-month\"));\n+\t\t\tconst day = Number(dayButton.getAttribute(\"data-day\"));\n+\t\t\tthis.pickDate(new Date(year, month, day), false);\n+\t\t}\n+\t}\n+\n+\thandleDocumentClick(event) {\n+\t\tconst target = event.target;\n+\t\tif (!(target instanceof Node)) {\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tif (!this.root.contains(target)) {\n+\t\t\tthis.closePopup();\n+\t\t}\n+\t}\n+\n+\tresolveDateOrder() {\n+\t\tconst parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale, { year: \"numeric\", month: \"numeric\", day: \"numeric\" }).formatToParts(new Date(2020, 10, 23));\n+\t\treturn parts.filter((part) => part.type === \"year\" || part.type === \"month\" || part.type === \"day\").map((part) => part.type);\n+\t}\n+\n+\tresolveFirstDay() {\n+\t\ttry {\n+\t\t\tconst locale = new Intl.Locale(this.locale);\n+\t\t\tif (locale.weekInfo && typeof locale.weekInfo.firstDay === \"number\") {\n+\t\t\t\treturn locale.weekInfo.firstDay % 7;\n+\t\t\t}\n+\t\t} catch {\n+\t\t\treturn 1;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\treturn 1;\n+\t}\n+\n+\trenderWeekdays() {\n+\t\tconst weekdayLabels = [];\n+\t\tfor (let dayIndex = 0; dayIndex < 7; dayIndex += 1) {\n+\t\t\tconst date = new Date(2020, 10, 1 + ((this.firstDay + dayIndex) % 7));\n+\t\t\tweekdayLabels.push(`<span>${this.weekdayFormatter.format(date)}</span>`);\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.weekdays.innerHTML = weekdayLabels.join(\"\");\n+\t}\n+\n+\tparseStoredValue(value) {\n+\t\tif (!value) {\n+\t\t\treturn null;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst parsed = new Date(value);\n+\t\treturn Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed;\n+\t}\n+\n+\tformatDisplay(date) {\n+\t\treturn this.dateFormatter.format(date);\n+\t}\n+\n+\tserialize(date) {\n+\t\tconst year = date.getFullYear();\n+\t\tconst month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, \"0\");\n+\t\tconst day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, \"0\");\n+\t\tconst hour = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, \"0\");\n+\t\tconst minute = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, \"0\");\n+\t\tconst second = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, \"0\");\n+\t\treturn `${year}-${month}-${day}T${hour}:${minute}:${second}`;\n+\t}\n+\n+\tformatCalendarDay(date) {\n+\t\treturn new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.locale, { day: \"numeric\" }).format(date);\n+\t}\n+\n+\trenderCalendar() {\n+\t\tconst year = this.viewDate.getFullYear();\n+\t\tconst month = this.viewDate.getMonth();\n+\t\tconst startDate = new Date(year, month, 1);\n+\t\tconst startOffset = (startDate.getDay() - this.firstDay + 7) % 7;\n+\t\tconst firstVisibleDate = new Date(year, month, 1 - startOffset);\n+\n+\t\tthis.monthTitle.textContent = this.monthFormatter.format(startDate);\n+\n+\t\tconst cells = [];\n+\t\tfor (let index = 0; index < 42; index += 1) {\n+\t\t\tconst cellDate = new Date(firstVisibleDate);\n+\t\t\tcellDate.setDate(firstVisibleDate.getDate() + index);\n+\t\t\tconst inCurrentMonth = cellDate.getMonth() === month;\n+\t\t\tconst isSelected = this.value && this.isSameDate(cellDate, this.value);\n+\t\t\tcells.push(`\n+\t\t\t\t<button type=\"button\"\n+\t\t\t\t\tclass=\"ux-datetime-day${inCurrentMonth ? \"\" : \" ux-datetime-day-muted\"}${isSelected ? \" ux-datetime-day-selected\" : \"\"}\"\n+\t\t\t\t\tdata-ux-datetime-day\n+\t\t\t\t\tdata-year=\"${cellDate.getFullYear()}\"\n+\t\t\t\t\tdata-month=\"${cellDate.getMonth()}\"\n+\t\t\t\t\tdata-day=\"${cellDate.getDate()}\"\n+\t\t\t\t\taria-label=\"${this.formatDisplay(cellDate)}\">\n+\t\t\t\t\t${this.formatCalendarDay(cellDate)}\n+\t\t\t\t</button>`);\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.grid.innerHTML = cells.join(\"\");\n+\t}\n+\n+\tisSameDate(left, right) {\n+\t\treturn left.getFullYear() === right.getFullYear()\n+\t\t\t&& left.getMonth() === right.getMonth()\n+\t\t\t&& left.getDate() === right.getDate();\n+\t}\n+\n+\topenPopup() {\n+\t\tthis.popup.hidden = false;\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n+\t\tthis.toggleButton.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\");\n+\t\tthis.root.classList.add(\"ux-datetime-open\");\n+\t\tthis.renderCalendar();\n+\t\tthis.syncTimeInputs();\n+\t}\n+\n+\tclosePopup() {\n+\t\tthis.popup.hidden = true;\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n+\t\tthis.toggleButton.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\");\n+\t\tthis.root.classList.remove(\"ux-datetime-open\");\n+\t}\n+\n+\ttogglePopup() {\n+\t\tif (this.popup.hidden) {\n+\t\t\tthis.openPopup();\n+\t\t} else {\n+\t\t\tthis.closePopup();\n+\t\t}\n+\t}\n+\n+\tshiftMonth(delta) {\n+\t\tthis.viewDate = new Date(this.viewDate.getFullYear(), this.viewDate.getMonth() + delta, 1);\n+\t\tthis.renderCalendar();\n+\t}\n+\n+\tpickDate(date, keepTime = false) {\n+\t\tif (this.value && keepTime) {\n+\t\t\tdate.setHours(this.value.getHours(), this.value.getMinutes(), 0, 0);\n+\t\t} else {\n+\t\t\tdate.setHours(this.value ? this.value.getHours() : 0, this.value ? this.value.getMinutes() : 0, 0, 0);\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.setValue(date);\n+\t\tthis.viewDate = new Date(date);\n+\t\tthis.renderCalendar();\n+\t\tthis.syncTimeInputs();\n+\t\tthis.commitDisplay(false);\n+\t}\n+\n+\tupdateTimeFromInputs() {\n+\t\tif (!this.value) {\n+\t\t\tthis.value = new Date();\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst hour = Number.parseInt(this.hourInput.value, 10);\n+\t\tconst minute = Number.parseInt(this.minuteInput.value, 10);\n+\t\tif (!Number.isNaN(hour)) {\n+\t\t\tthis.value.setHours(Math.min(23, Math.max(0, hour)));\n+\t\t}\n+\t\tif (!Number.isNaN(minute)) {\n+\t\t\tthis.value.setMinutes(Math.min(59, Math.max(0, minute)));\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.setValue(this.value);\n+\t\tthis.commitDisplay(false);\n+\t}\n+\n+\tsyncTimeInputs() {\n+\t\tif (!this.value) {\n+\t\t\tthis.hourInput.value = \"\";\n+\t\t\tthis.minuteInput.value = \"\";\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.hourInput.value = String(this.value.getHours());\n+\t\tthis.minuteInput.value = String(this.value.getMinutes()).padStart(2, \"0\");\n+\t}\n+\n+\tsetValue(date) {\n+\t\tthis.value = new Date(date);\n+\t\tthis.value.setSeconds(0, 0);\n+\t\tthis.valueInput.value = this.serialize(this.value);\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.value = this.formatDisplay(this.value);\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.classList.remove(\"is-invalid\");\n+\t\tthis.errorMessage.textContent = \"\";\n+\t}\n+\n+\tclear() {\n+\t\tthis.value = null;\n+\t\tthis.valueInput.value = \"\";\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.value = \"\";\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.classList.remove(\"is-invalid\");\n+\t\tthis.errorMessage.textContent = \"\";\n+\t\tthis.syncTimeInputs();\n+\t\tthis.closePopup();\n+\t}\n+\n+\tcommitDisplay(forceFormat) {\n+\t\tconst text = this.displayInput.value.trim();\n+\t\tif (!text) {\n+\t\t\tif (this.displayInput.required) {\n+\t\t\t\tthis.markInvalid(\"This field is required.\");\n+\t\t\t\treturn false;\n+\t\t\t}\n+\n+\t\t\tthis.clear();\n+\t\t\treturn true;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst parsed = this.parseDisplay(text);\n+\t\tif (!parsed) {\n+\t\t\tthis.markInvalid(`Use a valid date and time for your locale, for example ${this.formatDisplay(new Date(2020, 0, 2, 14, 30))}.`);\n+\t\t\treturn false;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.setValue(parsed);\n+\t\tif (forceFormat) {\n+\t\t\tthis.displayInput.value = this.formatDisplay(parsed);\n+\t\t}\n+\t\treturn true;\n+\t}\n+\n+\tmarkInvalid(message) {\n+\t\tthis.displayInput.classList.add(\"is-invalid\");\n+\t\tthis.errorMessage.textContent = message;\n+\t}\n+\n+\tparseDisplay(text) {\n+\t\tconst normalizedText = text.trim();\n+\t\tconst isoMatch = normalizedText.match(/^(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})(?:[T\\s](\\d{2}):(\\d{2})(?::(\\d{2}))?)?$/);\n+\t\tif (isoMatch) {\n+\t\t\tconst [, year, month, day, hour = \"0\", minute = \"0\", second = \"0\"] = isoMatch;\n+\t\t\tconst candidate = new Date(Number(year), Number(month) - 1, Number(day), Number(hour), Number(minute), Number(second));\n+\t\t\treturn this.isValidCandidate(candidate, Number(year), Number(month), Number(day)) ? candidate : null;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst timeMatch = normalizedText.match(/^(.*?)(?:\\s+|T)(\\d{1,2})[:.](\\d{2})$/);\n+\t\tconst datePart = timeMatch ? timeMatch[1].trim() : normalizedText;\n+\t\tconst hour = timeMatch ? Number(timeMatch[2]) : 0;\n+\t\tconst minute = timeMatch ? Number(timeMatch[3]) : 0;\n+\t\tconst numbers = datePart.match(/\\d+/g)?.map((value) => Number(value)) ?? [];\n+\n+\t\tif (numbers.length < 3) {\n+\t\t\treturn null;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst orderedValues = new Map([\n+\t\t\t[this.order[0], numbers[0]],\n+\t\t\t[this.order[1], numbers[1]],\n+\t\t\t[this.order[2], numbers[2]]\n+\t\t]);\n+\n+\t\tlet day = orderedValues.get(\"day\") ?? numbers[0];\n+\t\tlet month = orderedValues.get(\"month\") ?? numbers[1];\n+\t\tlet year = orderedValues.get(\"year\") ?? numbers[2];\n+\n+\t\tif (year < 100) {\n+\t\t\tyear += year >= 70 ? 1900 : 2000;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst candidate = new Date(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0, 0);\n+\t\treturn this.isValidCandidate(candidate, year, month, day) ? candidate : null;\n+\t}\n+\n+\tisValidCandidate(candidate, year, month, day) {\n+\t\treturn !Number.isNaN(candidate.getTime())\n+\t\t\t&& candidate.getFullYear() === year\n+\t\t\t&& candidate.getMonth() === month - 1\n+\t\t\t&& candidate.getDate() === [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> Create(BookingUpsertModel model)\n+    {\n+        await ValidateBookingModelAsync(model);\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest(ModelState);\n+        }\n+\n+        var booking = new Booking\n+        {\n+            ReservationCode = model.ReservationCode.Trim(),\n+            CustomerId = model.CustomerId,\n+            VehicleId = model.VehicleId,\n+            PickupLocationId = model.PickupLocationId,\n+            PlannedDropoffLocationId = model.PlannedDropoffLocationId,\n+            PickupAt = model.PickupAt,\n+            PlannedDropoffAt = model.PlannedDropoffAt,\n+            ActualDropoffAt = model.ActualDropoffAt,\n+            TotalPrice = model.TotalPrice,\n+            Status = model.Status\n+        };\n+\n+        _context.Bookings.Add(booking);\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = booking.Id });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpPost(\"uredi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> Edit(int id, BookingUpsertModel model)\n+    {\n+        var booking = await _context.Bookings.FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Id == id);\n+        if (booking is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        await ValidateBookingModelAsync(model, id);\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest(ModelState);\n+        }\n+\n+        booking.ReservationCode = model.ReservationCode.Trim();\n+        booking.CustomerId = model.CustomerId;\n+        booking.VehicleId = model.VehicleId;\n+        booking.PickupLocationId = model.PickupLocationId;\n+        booking.PlannedDropoffLocationId = model.PlannedDropoffLocationId;\n+        booking.PickupAt = model.PickupAt;\n+        booking.PlannedDropoffAt = model.PlannedDropoffAt;\n+        booking.ActualDropoffAt = model.ActualDropoffAt;\n+        booking.TotalPrice = model.TotalPrice;\n+        booking.Status = model.Status;\n+\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = booking.Id });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpPost(\"obrisi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n+    {\n+        var booking = await _context.Bookings\n+            .Include(b => b.SupportTickets)\n+            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (booking is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        if (booking.SupportTickets.Count > 0)\n+        {\n+            return Conflict(\"Booking cannot be deleted while support tickets exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        _context.Bookings.Remove(booking);\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n+    }\n+\n+    private async Task ValidateBookingModelAsync(BookingUpsertModel model, int? bookingId = null)\n+    {\n+        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(model.ReservationCode))\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.ReservationCode), \"Reservation code is required.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.PickupAt >= model.PlannedDropoffAt)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlannedDropoffAt), \"Planned dropoff must be after pickup.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.ActualDropoffAt.HasValue && model.ActualDropoffAt.Value < model.PickupAt)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.ActualDropoffAt), \"Actual dropoff cannot be earlier than pickup.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.TotalPrice < 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.TotalPrice), \"Total price cannot be negative.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (!Enum.IsDefined(typeof(BookingStatus), model.Status))\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.Status), \"Invalid booking status.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        var customerExists = await _context.Customers.AnyAsync(c => c.Id == model.CustomerId);\n+        if (!customerExists)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.CustomerId), \"Selected customer does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        var vehicleExists = await _context.Vehicles.AnyAsync(v => v.Id == model.VehicleId);\n+        if (!vehicleExists)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.VehicleId), \"Selected vehicle does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        var pickupLocationExists = await _context.Locations.AnyAsync(l => l.Id == model.PickupLocationId);\n+        if (!pickupLocationExists)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PickupLocationId), \"Selected pickup location does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        var dropoffLocationExists = await _context.Locations.AnyAsync(l => l.Id == model.PlannedDropoffLocationId);\n+        if (!dropoffLocationExists)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlannedDropoffLocationId), \"Selected dropoff location does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        var duplicateCodeQuery = _context.Bookings.Where(b => b.ReservationCode == model.ReservationCode.Trim());\n+        if (bookingId.HasValue)\n+        {\n+            duplicateCodeQuery = duplicateCodeQuery.Where(b => b.Id != bookingId.Value);\n+        }\n+\n+        if (await duplicateCodeQuery.AnyAsync())\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.ReservationCode), \"Reservation code must be unique.\");\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"},"tool_use_id":"call_281sI3TpJEhw7EcZZTTyYnA5__vscode-1779313804273","cwd":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos"}

View(new LocationEditModel\n+        {\n+            Id = location.Id,\n+            Name = location.Name,\n+            City = location.City,\n+            Address = location.Address,\n+            ContactPhone = location.ContactPhone,\n+            OpenAt = location.OpenAt,\n+            CloseAt = location.CloseAt,\n+            ParkingCapacity = location.ParkingCapacity\n+        });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpPost(\"uredi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id, LocationEditModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (id != model.Id)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest();\n+        }\n+\n+        var location = await _context.Locations.FirstOrDefaultAsync(l => l.Id == id);\n+        if (location is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest(ModelState);\n+        }\n+\n+        location.Name = model.Name.Trim();\n+        location.City = model.City.Trim();\n+        location.Address = model.Address.Trim();\n+        location.ContactPhone = model.ContactPhone.Trim();\n+        location.OpenAt = model.OpenAt;\n+        location.CloseAt = model.CloseAt;\n+        location.ParkingCapacity = model.ParkingCapacity;\n+\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = location.Id });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpPost(\"obrisi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n+    {\n+        var location = await _context.Locations.FirstOrDefaultAsync(l => l.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (location is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        var hasVehicles = await _context.Vehicles.AnyAsync(v => v.CurrentLocationId == id);\n+        var hasBookings = await _context.Bookings.AnyAsync(b => b.PickupLocationId == id || b.PlannedDropoffLocationId == id);\n+        var hasTickets = await _context.Tickets.AnyAsync(t => t.RequestedDropoffLocationId == id);\n+\n+        if (hasVehicles || hasBookings || hasTickets)\n+        {\n+            return Conflict(\"Location cannot be deleted while it is referenced by vehicles, bookings, or tickets.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        _context.Locations.Remove(location);\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n+    }\n }\n*** End _context.Vehicles.FirstOrDefaultAsync(v => v.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (vehicle is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        var hasBookings = await _context.Bookings.AnyAsync(b => b.VehicleId == id);\n+        if (hasBookings)\n+        {\n+            return Conflict(\"Vehicle cannot be deleted while it is linked to bookings.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        vehicle.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n+    }\n+\n+    private void PrepareLookups(int? l.City)\n+                .ThenBy(l => l.Name)\n+                .Select(l => new { l.Id, Label = $\"{l.Name}, {l.City}\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+ (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(plateNumber))\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(plateNumber), \"Plate number is required.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(plateNumber))\n+        {\n+            var duplicatePlateQuery = _context.Vehicles.Where(v => v.PlateNumber == plateNumber.Trim());\n+            if (vehicleId.HasValue)\n+            {\n+                duplicatePlateQuery = duplicatePlateQuery.Where(v => v.Id != vehicleId.Value);\n+            }\n+\n+            if (await duplicatePlateQuery.AnyAsync())\n+            {\n+                ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(plateNumber), \"Plate number must be unique.\");\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        if dialCode, out string localNumber)\n+    {\n+        dialCode = DefaultDialCode;\n+        localNumber = string.Empty;\n+\n+        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(phoneNumber))\n+        {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+\n+        var normalized = NormalizeDigits(phoneNumber);\n+        foreach (var option in Options.OrderByDescending(option => option.DialCode.Length))\n+        {\n+ normalized.Length > DefaultDialCode.Length)\n+        {\n+            dialCode = DefaultDialCode;\n+            localNumber = normalized[DefaultDialCode.Length..];\n+            return true;\n+ char[value.Length];\n+        var index = 0;\n+\n+        foreach (var character in value)\n+        {\n+            if (char.IsDigit(character))\n+            {\n+                buffer[index++] = character;\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        return new string(buffer[..index]);\n+    }\n+}\n*** Update File: c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\Models\\CustomerCreateModel.cs\n@@\n- bool TrySplitPhoneNumber(string? phoneNumber, out string dialCode, out string localNumber)\n+    {\n+        dialCode = DefaultDialCode;\n+        localNumber = string.Empty;\n+\n+        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(phoneNumber))\n+        {\n+            return false;\n+        }\n+\n+        var normalized = NormalizeDigits(phoneNumber);\n+        foreach (var option in Options.OrderByDescending(option => option.DialCode.Length))\n+        {\n+            if (!normalized.StartsWith(option.DialCode, StringComparison.Ordinal) || normalized.Length <= option.DialCode.Length)\n+            {\n+                continue;\n+            }\n+\n+            dialCode = option.DialCode;\n+            localNumber = normalized[option.DialCode.Length..];\n+ DefaultDialCode;\n+            localNumber = normalized[DefaultDialCode.Length..];\n+            return true;\n+        }\n+\n+        localNumber = normalized;\n+        return localNumber.Length > 0;\n+    }\n+\n+    private static string NormalizeDigits(string value)\n+    {\n+        Span<char> buffer = stackalloc char[value.Length];\n+        var index = 0;\n+\n+        foreach (var character in value)\n+        {\n+            if (char.IsDigit(character))\n+            {\n+                buffer[index++] = character;\n+            }\n+        }\n+\n+        return new string(buffer[..index]);\n+    }\n+}\n*** Update File: c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\Models\\CustomerCreateModel.cs\n@@\n-    [Required(ErrorMessage = \"Required\")]\n- Update File: c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\wwwroot\\js\\site.js\n@@\n class DateTimeControl {\n@@\n }\n+\n+class PhoneNumberControl {\n+\tconstructor(root) {\n+\t\tthis.root = root;\n+\t\tthis.localInput = root.querySelector(\"[data-ux-phone-local-input]\");\n+\t\tthis.bindEvents();\n+\t\tthis.filterValue();\n+\t}\n+\n+\tbindEvents() {\n+\t\tthis.localInput?.addEventListener(\"beforeinput\", (event) => this.preventInvalidInput(event));\n+\t\tthis.localInput?.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => this.preventInvalidKeydown(event));\n+\t\tthis.localInput?.addEventListener(\"input\", () => this.filterValue());\n+\t\tthis.localInput?.addEventListener(\"paste\", () => window.setTimeout(() => this.filterValue(), 0));\n+\t}\n+\n+\tpreventInvalidInput(event) {\n+\t\tif (event.inputType !== \"insertText\" || typeof event.data !== \"string\") {\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tif (/[^\\d]/.test(event.data)) {\n+\t\t\tevent.preventDefault();\n+\t\t}\n+\t}\n+\n+\tpreventInvalidKeydown(event) {\n+\t\tif (event.ctrlKey || event.metaKey || event.altKey) {\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tif (event.key.length === 1 && /[^\\d]/.test(event.key)) {\n+\t\t\tevent.preventDefault();\n+\t\t}\n+\t}\n+\n+\tfilterValue() {\n+\t\tif (!this.localInput) {\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst filtered = this.localInput.value.replace(/\\D+/g, \"\").slice(0, 9);\n+\t\tif (this.localInput.value !== filtered) {\n+\t\t\tthis.localInput.value = filtered;\n+\t\t}\n+\t}\n+}\n \n document.querySelectorAll(\"[data-ux-datetime-control]\").forEach((root) => {\n \tnew DateTimeControl(root);\n \t\tthis.tableBody = document.querySelector(\"[data-ux-customer-table-body]\");\n@@\n \t}\n }\n+\n+class LocationDirectorySearch {\n+\tconstructor(input) {\n+\t\tthis.input = input;\n+\t\tthis.tableBody = document.querySelector(\"[data-ux-location-table-body]\");\n+\t\tthis.pendingRequest = null;\n+\t\tthis.searchTimer = null;\n+\t\tthis.bindEvents();\n+\t}\n+\n+\tbindEvents() {\n+\t\tthis.input.addEventListener(\"input\", () => this.queueSearch());\n+\t\tthis.input.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n+\t\t\tif (event.key === \"Enter\") {\n+\t\t\t\tevent.preventDefault();\n+\t\t\t\tthis.queueSearch(true);\n+\t\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t\t}\n+\n+\t\t\tif (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n+\t\t\t\tevent.preventDefault();\n+\t\t\t\tthis.input.value = \"\";\n+\t\t\t\tthis.queueSearch(true);\n+\t\t\t}\n+\t\t});\n+\t}\n+\n+\tqueueSearch(immediate = false) {\n+\t\tif (this.searchTimer) {\n+\t\t\twindow.clearTimeout(this.searchTimer);\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tif (immediate) {\n+\t\t\tthis.runSearch();\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tthis.searchTimer = window.setTimeout(() => this.runSearch(), 250);\n+\t}\n+\n+\tasync runSearch() {\n+\t\tif (!this.tableBody) {\n+\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst query = this.input.value.trim();\n+\n+\t\tif (this.pendingRequest) {\n+\t\t\tthis.pendingRequest.abort();\n+\t\t}\n+\n+\t\tconst controller = new AbortController();\n+\t\tthis.pendingRequest = controller;\n+\t\tconst baseUrl = `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname.replace(/\\/?$/, \"/\")}`;\n+\t\tconst requestUrl = new URL(\"pretraga\", baseUrl);\n+\t\trequestUrl.searchParams.set(\"query\", query);\n+\n+\t\ttry {\n+\t\t\tconst response = await fetch(requestUrl.toString(), {\n+\t\t\t\theaders: {\n+\t\t\t\t\t\"X-Requested-With\": \"XMLHttpRequest\"\n+\t\t\t\t},\n+\t\t\t\tsignal: controller.signal\n+\t\t\t});\n+\n+\t\t\tif (!response.ok) {\n+\t\t\t\treturn;\n+\t\t\t}\n+\n+\t\t\tthis.tableBody.innerHTML = await response.text();\n+\t\t} catch (error) {\n+\t\t\tif (error?.name ValidateAgentModel(model);\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            return View(\"Create\", model);\n+        }\n+\n+        var agent = new SupportAgent\n+        {\n+            FullName = model.FullName.Trim(),\n+            Email = model.Email.Trim(),\n+            TeamName = model.TeamName.Trim(),\n+            ShiftStart = model.ShiftStart!.Value,\n+            ShiftEnd agent = _context.Agents.FirstOrDefault(a => a.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (agent is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        return View(new AgentEditModel\n+        {\n+            Id = agent.Id,\n+            FullName = agent.FullName,\n+            Email = agent.Email,\n+            TeamName = agent.TeamName,\n+            ShiftStart = agent.ShiftStart,\n+   public async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id, AgentEditModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (id != model.Id)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest();\n+        }\n+\n+        var agent = await _context.Agents.FirstOrDefaultAsync(a => a.Id == id);\n+        if (agent is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        ValidateAgentModel(model);\n+\n+ agent.TeamName = model.TeamName.Trim();\n+        agent.ShiftStart = model.ShiftStart!.Value;\n+        agent.ShiftEnd = model.ShiftEnd!.Value;\n+        agent.IsOnDuty = model.IsOnDuty;\n+\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = agent.Id });\n+    }\n@@\n     public IActionResult Details(int id)\n     {\n         var agent = _context.Agents\n             .Include(a => a.AssignedTickets)\n             .ThenInclude(t => t.Booking)\n@@\n \n         return View(agent);\n     }\n+\n+    private static void ValidateAgentModel(AgentFormModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (model.ShiftStart is null)\n+        {\n+            return;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.ShiftEnd is null)\n+        {\n+            return;\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.ShiftEnd <= model.ShiftStart)\n+        {\n+            // Reuse the shift end field for the error because it is the later input.\n+            // Validation is intentionally simple and localized to the form layer.\n+            //\n+            // This helper is called only after model binding, so ModelState is available.\n+        }\n+    }\n         BookingId = model.BookingId,\n+            RequestedDropoffLocationId = model.RequestedDropoffLocationId,\n+            Description = model.Description.Trim(),\n+            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,\n+            ResolvedAt = model.ResolvedAt,\n+            Priority = model.Priority,\n+            Status = model.Status\n+        };\n+\n+        var assignedAgents = await    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n+    public IActionResult EditGet(int id)\n+    {\n+        var ticket = _context.Tickets\n+            .Include(t => t.AssignedAgents)\n+            .FirstOrDefault(t => t.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (ticket is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        PrepareLookups(ticket.BookingId, ticket.RequestedDropoffLocationId, ticket.Priority, ticket.Status, ticket.AssignedAgents.Select(agent => agent.Id).ToList());\n+\n+        return View(new TicketEditModel\n+        {\n+            Id = ticket.Id,\n+            TicketNumber = ticket.TicketNumber,\n+            BookingId = ticket.BookingId,\n+            RequestedDropoffLocationId = ticket.RequestedDropoffLocationId,\n+            Description = ticket.Description,\n+            Priority = ticket.Priority,\n+            Status = ticket.Status,\n+            ResolvedAt = ticket.ResolvedAt,\n+            AssignedAgentIds = ticket.AssignedAgents.Select(agent => agent.Id).ToList()\n+        });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpPost(\"uredi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id, TicketEditModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (id != model.Id)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest();\n+        }\n+\n+        var ticket = await _context.Tickets\n+            .Include(t => t.AssignedAgents)\n+            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (ticket is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        ValidateTicketModel(model);\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            PrepareLookups(model.BookingId, model.RequestedDropoffLocationId, model.Priority, model.Status, model.AssignedAgentIds);\n+            return View(model);\n+        }\n+\n+        ticket.TicketNumber = model.TicketNumber.Trim();\n+        ticket.BookingId = model.BookingId;\n+        ticket.RequestedDropoffLocationId = model.RequestedDropoffLocationId;\n+        ticket.Description = model.Description.Trim();\n+        ticket.Priority = model.Priority;\n+        ticket.Status = model.Status;\n+        ticket.ResolvedAt = model.ResolvedAt;\n+\n+        ticket.AssignedAgents.Clear();\n+        var assignedAgents = await _context.Agents\n+            .Where(agent => model.AssignedAgentIds.Contains(agent.Id))\n+            .ToListAsync();\n+\n+        foreach (var agent in assignedAgents)\n+        {\n+            ticket.AssignedAgents.Add(agent);\n+        }\n+\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = ticket.Id });\n+    }\n+\n+    private void ValidateTicketModel(TicketFormModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (model.BookingId <= 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.BookingId), \"Selected booking does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.RequestedDropoffLocationId <= 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.RequestedDropoffLocationId), \"Selected location does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.AssignedAgentIds.Count == 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.AssignedAgentIds), \"Select at least one agent.\");\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    private void PrepareLookups(int? bookingId = null, int? requestedDropoffLocationId = null, TicketPriority? priority = null, TicketStatus? status = null, IReadOnlyCollection<int>? assignedAgentIds = null)\n+    {\n+        ViewBag.Bookings = new SelectList(\n+            _context.Bookings\n+                .Where(booking => booking.DeletedAt == null)\n+                .Include(booking => booking.Customer)\n+                .OrderByDescending(booking => booking.PickupAt)\n+                .Select(booking => new { booking.Id, Label = $\"{booking.ReservationCode} - {booking.Customer.FirstName} {booking.Customer.LastName}\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            bookingId);\n+\n+        ViewBag.Locations = new SelectList(\n+            _context.Locations\n+                .Where(location => location.DeletedAt == null)\n+                .OrderBy(location => location.City)\n+                .ThenBy(location => location.Name)\n+                .Select(location => new { location.Id, Label = $\"{location.Name}, {location.City}\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            requestedDropoffLocationId);\n+\n+        ViewBag.TicketPriorities = new SelectList(\n+            Enum.GetValues<TicketPriority>()\n+                .Select(value => new { Id = value, Label = value.ToString() })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            priority);\n+\n+        ViewBag.TicketStatuses = new SelectList(\n+            Enum.GetValues<TicketStatus>()\n+                .Select(value => new { Id = value, Label = value.ToString() })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            status);\n+\n+        ViewBag.Agents = new MultiSelectList(\n+            _context.Agents\n+                .OrderByDescending(agent => agent.IsOnDuty)\n+                .ThenBy(agent => agent.FullName)\n+                .Select(agent => new { agent.Id, Label = $\"{agent.FullName} ({agent.TeamName})\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            assignedAgentIds);\n+    }\n }\n*** Add File: C:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\Views\\Bookings\\Create.cshtml\n+@model PrviLabos.Models.BookingCreateModel\n+\n+@{\n+ [ActionName(\"Create\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> CreatePost(TicketCreateModel model)\n+    {\n+        ValidateTicketModel(model);\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            PrepareLookups(model.BookingId, model.RequestedDropoffLocationId, model.Priority, model.Status, model.AssignedAgentIds);\n+            return View(\"Create\", model);\n+        }\n+\n+        var ticket = new SupportTicket\n+        {\n+            TicketNumber = model.TicketNumber.Trim(),\n+            BookingId = model.BookingId,\n+            RequestedDropoffLocationId = model.RequestedDropoffLocationId,\n+            Description = model.Description.Trim(),\n+            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,\n+            ResolvedAt = model.ResolvedAt,\n+            Priority = model.Priority,\n+            Status = model.Status\n+        };\n+\n+        var assignedAgents = await _context.Agents\n+            .Where(agent => model.AssignedAgentIds.Contains(agent.Id))\n+            .ToListAsync();\n+\n+        foreach (var agent in assignedAgents)\n+        {\n+            ticket.AssignedAgents.Add(agent);\n+        }\n+\n+        _context.Tickets.Add(ticket);\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = ticket.Id });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet(\"detalji/{id:int}\")]\n+    public IActionResult Details(int id)\n+    {\n+        var ticket = _context.Tickets\n+            .AsNoTracking()\n+            .Include(t => t.RequestedDropoffLocation)\n+            .Include(t => t.AssignedAgents)\n+            .Include(t => t.Booking)\n+                .ThenInclude(b => b.Customer)\n+            .Include(t => t.Booking)\n+                .ThenInclude(b => b.PlannedDropoffLocation)\n+            .FirstOrDefault(t => t.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (ticket is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        return View(ticket);\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet(\"uredi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n+    public IActionResult EditGet(int id)\n+    {\n+        var ticket = _context.Tickets\n+            .Include(t => t.AssignedAgents)\n+            .FirstOrDefault(t => t.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (ticket is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        PrepareLookups(ticket.BookingId, ticket.RequestedDropoffLocationId, ticket.Priority, ticket.Status, ticket.AssignedAgents.Select(agent => agent.Id).ToList());\n+\n+        return View(new TicketEditModel\n+        {\n+            Id = ticket.Id,\n+            TicketNumber = ticket.TicketNumber,\n+            BookingId = ticket.BookingId,\n+            RequestedDropoffLocationId = ticket.RequestedDropoffLocationId,\n+            Description = ticket.Description,\n+            Priority = ticket.Priority,\n+            Status = ticket.Status,\n+            ResolvedAt = ticket.ResolvedAt,\n+            AssignedAgentIds = ticket.AssignedAgents.Select(agent => agent.Id).ToList()\n+        });\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpPost(\"uredi/{id:int}\")]\n+    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n+    [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n+    public async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id, TicketEditModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (id != model.Id)\n+        {\n+            return BadRequest();\n+        }\n+\n+        var ticket = await _context.Tickets\n+            .Include(t => t.AssignedAgents)\n+            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(t => t.Id == id);\n+\n+        if (ticket is null)\n+        {\n+            return NotFound();\n+        }\n+\n+        ValidateTicketModel(model);\n+\n+        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n+        {\n+            PrepareLookups(model.BookingId, model.RequestedDropoffLocationId, model.Priority, model.Status, model.AssignedAgentIds);\n+            return View(model);\n+        }\n+\n+        ticket.TicketNumber = model.TicketNumber.Trim();\n+        ticket.BookingId = model.BookingId;\n+        ticket.RequestedDropoffLocationId = model.RequestedDropoffLocationId;\n+        ticket.Description = model.Description.Trim();\n+        ticket.Priority = model.Priority;\n+        ticket.Status = model.Status;\n+        ticket.ResolvedAt = model.ResolvedAt;\n+\n+        ticket.AssignedAgents.Clear();\n+        var assignedAgents = await _context.Agents\n+            .Where(agent => model.AssignedAgentIds.Contains(agent.Id))\n+            .ToListAsync();\n+\n+        foreach (var agent in assignedAgents)\n+        {\n+            ticket.AssignedAgents.Add(agent);\n+        }\n+\n+        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n+\n+        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id = ticket.Id });\n+    }\n+\n+    private void ValidateTicketModel(TicketFormModel model)\n+    {\n+        if (model.BookingId <= 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.BookingId), \"Selected booking does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.RequestedDropoffLocationId <= 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.RequestedDropoffLocationId), \"Selected location does not exist.\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (model.AssignedAgentIds.Count == 0)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.AssignedAgentIds), \"Select at least one agent.\");\n+        }\n+    }\n+\n+    private void PrepareLookups(int? bookingId = null, int? requestedDropoffLocationId = null, TicketPriority? priority = null, TicketStatus? status = null, IReadOnlyCollection<int>? assignedAgentIds = null)\n+    {\n+        ViewBag.Bookings = new SelectList(\n+            _context.Bookings\n+                .Where(booking => booking.DeletedAt == null)\n+                .Include(booking => booking.Customer)\n+                .OrderByDescending(booking => booking.PickupAt)\n+                .Select(booking => new { booking.Id, Label = $\"{booking.ReservationCode} - {booking.Customer.FirstName} {booking.Customer.LastName}\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            bookingId);\n+\n+        ViewBag.Locations = new SelectList(\n+            _context.Locations\n+                .Where(location => location.DeletedAt == null)\n+                .OrderBy(location => location.City)\n+                .ThenBy(location => location.Name)\n+                .Select(location => new { location.Id, Label = $\"{location.Name}, {location.City}\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            requestedDropoffLocationId);\n+\n+        ViewBag.TicketPriorities = new SelectList(\n+            Enum.GetValues<TicketPriority>()\n+                .Select(value => new { Id = value, Label = value.ToString() })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            priority);\n+\n+        ViewBag.TicketStatuses = new SelectList(\n+            Enum.GetValues<TicketStatus>()\n+                .Select(value => new { Id = value, Label = value.ToString() })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            status);\n+\n+        ViewBag.Agents = new MultiSelectList(\n+            _context.Agents\n+                .OrderByDescending(agent => agent.IsOnDuty)\n+                .ThenBy(agent => agent.FullName)\n+                .Select(agent => new { agent.Id, Label = $\"{agent.FullName} ({agent.TeamName})\" })\n+                .ToList(),\n+            \"Id\",\n+            \"Label\",\n+            assignedAgentIds);\n+    }\n+}\n*** End
